quote: Diligent, curious, and one of the most self-directed students I have supervised. His IoT coursework projects show real end-to-end ownership from firmware to dashboard.
name: Dr. [SUPERVISOR_NAME]

quote: Reliable lab partner. Carried our hackathon team's firmware in 36 hours and stayed calm when the board wouldn't boot.
name: [HACKATHON_TEAMMATE]
